subcodes.first_line: O thou of joyous disposition! For some time no letter hath come from thee, and no breeze from the garden of thy heart and soul hath wafted hither [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خوش خو مدتیست که نامه ای از تو نرسید و نسیمی از حدیقه دل و جان نوزید من در
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
